name: TestGetWaitFrNullFrameData
title: TestGetWaitFrNullFrameData
description: If a FlexRay Null Frame is the last event that triggers a wait instruction, the frame’s content can be called up with the first function.
The second function can only be used for "joined events". The number of the "joined event" (return value of "testJoin...") is here being used as an index.

parameters.name: aNullFrame
parameters.description: Null Frame variable that should be filled in with this function.
